scripts.functions:deploy: npm run functions:lint && firebase deploy --only functions --project vennuzo

scripts.functions:deploy:payments: npm run functions:lint && firebase deploy --only functions:createEventTicketPaymentForOrder,functions:checkHubtelTicketStatus,functions:createWebEventTicketOrder,functions:hubtelCallback,functions:hubtelReturn --project vennuzo
